---
title: "Lerngelegenheiten"
subtitle: "Webseite für die Lerngelegenheiten von Richard Conrardy"
format: html
listing:
  categories: true
  type: table
  contents:
    - "*.qmd"
    - "*/*.qmd"
  fields: [title, subtitle, author]
  filter-ui: [title, subtitle, author]
  exclude:
    - filename: "woche*"
  page-size: 13
---
